transcript.text:
(A fine trigger that will tickle your ears...) The sound of sizzling rain
(Welcome to the beautiful red meat paradise)
(Huh?)
(Why was the owner so surprised...?) I was a little surprised haha
(5 servings of pork belly) Looks delicious
(3 servings of neck cut pork)
(3 servings of beef flank)
(3 thin-sliced pork belly)
(Let's fill this huge cauldron lid...) I think it can fit 2kg at once!
(14 servings of pork party!)
(After eagerly inhaling the food...)
(She's stir-frying something with the meat...?) I think it would taste better stir-fried!
(The hidden cooking skills of the food genius...)
(Coming soon) So delicious
(But perhaps... Are you full yet...?)
Hi everyone

I'm here in Hongje today
The original plan of the day was...
to visit a famous place for soft tofu udon
But there were too many customers
(Soft tofu udon will continue...!) It was hard to film, so I'll give it a shot next time
(That's why I came up with today's food...!) I was like, "Is there anything delicious nearby?"
(Meat never goes wrong) I found a place famous for cauldron lid pork belly!
(Located in Seodaemun-gu, Seoul) It's located nearby the apartment complex
("Old Cauldron Lid Grilled Pork Belly")
(Entering the restaurant) Hello, the cauldron lid is so big!
Wow, look at this cauldron lid
(Lid of an unusual size...) This is the biggest cauldron lid I've ever seen!
I think it can fit 2kg of meat at once!
(Why is that so...?) I only need to grill it twice
(Scanning the menu thoroughly!) They have pork belly, neck cut pork, and beef flank!
(Various types of meat) The thin-sliced pork belly sounds delicious, let's try it all!

Excuse me!
I'll have 5 servings of pork belly
and neck cut pork, beef flank, and thin-sliced pork belly 3 servings
That will be 9 servings
So a total of 14 servings, please!!
Do you eat that much...?
I eat quite a lot haha
(While the side dishes come out first...) Thank you
(Start getting ready for the meat party...!)
(A total of 14 servings of meat served!)
Thank you
(With bean sprouts and kimchi!) They also have kimchi...
Thank you
Wow, thank you
(4 kinds of meat in 14 servings!) Amazing
(Thin-sliced pork belly & Pork belly) Is this beef flank and thin-sliced pork belly?

(Beef flank & Neck cut pork) This is one thick neck cut pork
Let's try grilling it quickly!
I was surprised earlier
Because she ordered so much...
(Start by oiling the cauldron lid!) Is this how I'm supposed to coat it with oil?
- Oh, look! - It's ready now
Let's coat some oil like this
(Shiny) I think it'll be delicious
(Let's start with the pork belly!)
(Do you hear that...?) What a sound! Sounds like rain
(The sound of pork belly cooking properly...)
(Pork belly ASMR)
Let's grill the mushrooms too
Looks delicious...
When I get some oil, I'll grill the kimchi
(Grill faster...)

The sound of sizzling rain
(Properly stimulating the hearing and vision...)
I'll grill the kimchi here!
With a few bean sprouts!
(Satisfied)
(Checks the timing to flip the meat)
(And that's now) Let's flip it now!
Looks delicious
I like the fatty area
This fatty area is so thick
Let's cut it in half
(Cook the outside crispy and moist inside...!) I don't like to cook it for too long
So I'll try taking a bite now
Let's try one, just one!
And now...
put a bit of ssamjang

and the pachae* *Seasoned green onion salad
(Is this heaven...?) It's delicious, it's perfect, I'm so happy
The pachae seasoning is delicious
And the meat is just the right thickness!
(The food today looks amazing...)
It's so delicious
(Busy eating and grilling)
Let's put the cooked ones aside
(Bring in the next meat!) Place the new ones right away
(Meat shouldn't stop...)
I'll try it with the bean sprouts too!
(I'm so happy... At this moment...)
(Aaaahh)
(Let's cool it down and eat...) That was so hot, oh my
(+ one more chunk of neck cut pork)
(Can she eat it all...?)

It goes well with the pickled radish wrap
Let's also add the pachae
(NOM NOM)
So delicious
Let's wrap it in lettuce!
(I can't miss out on the wrap...!)
(Marbling-filled neck cut pork)
It tastes better when you wrap the perilla leaves from the back
(I just heard it somewhere) I don't know why, I think it gives more texture?
I'll try dipping in this garlic sauce
It's as sour as the pachae sauce
And has a strong garlic scent!
(Wow)
(Let's cut up the neck cut pork!)
(This neck cut pork is perfectly cooked...)
I'll try one of the cooked neck cut pork

Let's dip it in seasoned oil
Wow
(I knew it can't go wrong...) So delicious!
Let's gently grill it here
Thin-sliced pork belly? Beef flank? What should I eat first?
Oh, this is melting!
Let's put this in the freezer for a while as I eat
Excuse me!
(Please refreeze the meat...) I'm sorry, but can you put this in the freezer again?
Thank you!
Meanwhile, let's grill the pork belly again!
(Finished placing all the neck cut pork...)
The mushrooms are so well done!
Mushrooms have to be dipped in salt
Ssamjang
Garlic

(+ Pachae)
(+ Bean sprouts)
(The kimchi is grilled perfectly!!) Wow, this kimchi is so nicely cooked, give it a try
Roll up the neck cut pork with kimchi!
(Real happiness) So delicious!
(Cleanse with the bean sprout soup!)
(Let's cut up the pork belly and neck cut pork haha)
(Throws in the kimchi)
But...
When I eat them all together
and it's too hot that I can't eat quickly,
wrapping them in pickled radish
can help me to eat more lol
(Let's survive the team dinner with this life hack) Surely, it's not hot at all with the pickled radish wrap
(Let's speed up for the next round!)
Excuse me!

Can you clean this grill, please?
I'll change it for you!
(The owner just changes the grill for her) You're going to change it? Thank you
You could've just wiped it
I can't because it's messy and you have to grill a lot
Thank you!
(With a clean new cauldron lid) Thank you
(Beef flank & thin-sliced pork belly up next!) Please put it here
(The owner is simply amazed by Tzuyang lol)
Her belly is so flat!!
It's the 8th serving now...
It's so delicious
(Okay, help yourself...)
(Refrozen beef flank & thin-sliced pork belly)
Let's coat it with some oil!
The smoke is coming up!

(Get greasy!)
(Shining again!) It's nicely coated with oil
I ate a lot of pork, so let's try the beef flank
(Super focused face)
(The charm of beef plank is that it cooks quickly!)
Yay, beef flank
(Rescue it before it burns!)
Last time at 'Jangsu Sikdang', they flipped the cauldron lid upside down
I recall it as kimchi stir-fried spicy pork...
(The kimchi pork belly she ate about 2 months ago!) Amazing!
Wow, it's awesome!!
(The best-looking food in the hood...) This looks absolutely amazing
(Memories are coming back...!) The cauldron lid and thin-sliced pork belly reminded me of it
I want to season this and just mix it together!
(This soon becomes a reality...)
Let's wrap it in pickled radish

(Thin-sliced pork belly)
(Place it over the cauldron lid...!)
(Thin-sliced pork belly and beef flank are tasty in their ways)
The beef flank tastes better with the garlic sauce!
I'm not a fan of grilling my meat crispy
But thin-sliced pork belly is an exception
(Let me first grill some so I can eat...)
Shall we try it?
Excuse me!
Can I have one doenjangjjigae*? Or some other stew? *Soybean paste stew
We only have doenjangjjigae
(If you're done, get out!)
Tastes like crispy chips!
It's dinner time now
So the tables are full...
When I get older in the future

(What about 'Garden Bunsik'...?) should I open a cauldron lid pork belly restaurant?
I need to grill this again while I'm eating!
(Pour in the beef flank!)
(Doenjangjjigae is here!) Thank you
Wow, this looks delicious
(Boiling hot..!)
Shall we try the stew?
(After all, it's doenjangjjigae...!!) I should've ordered this earlier
Wow, I needed this earlier
It tastes good even without any meat inside
It tastes like meat though!
(Suddenly got an inspiration!) I think grilling the thin-sliced pork belly with kimchi will taste amazing
(Chef Tzuyang's PLAN 1) Let's grill the beef flank all in advance
(PLAN 2. Tzuyang has all the plans) I want to try something out
(PLAN 3) Put the thin-sliced pork belly back on
(PLAN 4) Beef flank, you come down

(PLAN 5. Be proud of your plans) Just thinking about it makes me happy!
(PLAN 6) Grill the remaining pork belly first
(PLAN 7. Meanwhile, eat the beef flank) Dip it
(So sour) Wow, this is so sour
(PLAN 8) I need to grill the kimchi in advance
(PLAN 9) Finely cut the pork belly
(Why are you so good at cutting them...?)
(PLAN 10. Pour in the thin-sliced pork belly)
(Wait while it cooks...!)
I like to put meat in my doenjangjjigae
(Real meat lover)
(The excitement felt in the scissors...) This is the beef flank doenjangjjigae
(PLAN 11. Cut the kimchi on the thin-sliced pork belly too) If it's slightly cooked, get the kimchi
(So satisfied) It's a really amazing idea
And now...
(PLAN 12. Chop the pachae finely and add it)

(Mesmerized) Looks so delicious, right?
(First, it looks perfect...)
And now...
(PLAN 13) Add a little kimchi soup
(PLAN 14. Cut the perilla leaves)
Let's taste it a bit
(I made it, but it's so delicious!) So good
Let's add a little more kimchi soup
(This isn't a little bit... LOL)
Sorry for using so many dishes... heh
(Dishes...?)
(Washing dishes is not the problem...)
(I'm more scared to see you eat all this...)
(Finally, Tzuyang's kimchi pork belly is finished)
It would be delicious to make fried rice here
(Self-reflection) No, let's stop here for today

For sure
It tastes different
Because there was
a separate seasoning
But I only added kimchi soup here
(Hmph, how dare you compare?) Certainly, it tastes different from 'Jangsu Sikdang'
But it's still delicious
Oops, it's hot
(It's hot...)
(But I want to eat...)
(It's hot...)
So hot
(Wrap it up when it's hot!)
(With lots of meat...!!)
(And eat the stew LOL)
(Get the meat)

(Finishes all the remaining food...)
Lettuce!
The doenjangjjigae only costs 1,000 won?! So cheap!
(Lovely 1,000 won doenjangjjigae...)
How can you eat all of that?!!!
You're so beautiful and also eat so well!
Oh my goodness
I'm a fan
Thank you for your support!
(Scrapes to the bottom of the doenjangjjigae...)
(Total 14 servings of cauldron lid pork belly CLEAR!) Wow, I ate so well
The cauldron lid pork belly today
and at the end,
the stir-fried kimchi thin-sliced pork belly was perfect!
Thanks for the meal!
Did you finish eating?

I did
(The restaurant was too busy) I couldn't even watch you eat
(She felt bad that she couldn't take care of Tzuyang properly) I enjoyed it so much, you're busy, right?
Please take some pictures with us!
Of course!
(I made precious memories again today...!)
